description.en: Return True if path refers to an existing path, including broken symbolic links. Equivalent to exists() on platforms lacking os.lstat(). Changed in version 3.6: Accepts a path-like object.

excerpt.es: Return True if path refers to an existing path, including broken symbolic links. Equivalent to exists() on platforms lacking os.lstat(). Changed in version 3.6: Accepts a path-like object.
